SectorAnalysis.description: Structured extraction for a single sector from the day's news.

entities.description: Named companies, organizations, or notable figures mentioned.
entities.title: Entities

sector.description: Sector name from the fixed taxonomy.
sector.title: Sector

sentiment.description: Overall market sentiment for this sector.
sentiment.title: Sentiment

news_category.description: Primary type of news event driving this sector.
news_category.title: News Category

extraction_status.description: 'ok' if full extraction succeeded; 'partial' if evidence was thin.
extraction_status.title: Extraction Status

SectorAnalysis.title: SectorAnalysis

schema.description: Analysis of all relevant sectors found in a single day's news feed.

sectors.description: List of ALL relevant sectors (1–8 max). Only include sectors with clear evidence in the news.
sectors.title: Sectors

schema.title: MultiSectorAnalysis

messages.content:
You are Ava, a sharp trader assistant. Analyze the FULL news feed and extract ALL relevant sectors.

RULES:
- Output ONLY valid JSON matching the schema provided.
- If no sector can be identified, return: {"sectors": []}
- Each sector must use a name from the enum exactly as written.
- Fill ALL required fields for each sector.
- No duplicate sectors. Maximum 8 sectors.
- No extra text outside JSON.

2026-05-05: Spirit starts monthslong process of dismantling airline after biggest collapse in a generation: Spirit Airlines was back in bankruptcy court to start dismantling the airline.. 2026-05-05: U.S. says 'Project Freedom' will reopen Hormuz Strait for commerce. Experts are skeptical: President Donald Trump announced the operation Sunday, saying the U.S. will \guide\" ships stuck due to the Iran war through the Strait of Hormuz.". 2026-05-05: Micron zooms past $700 billion market cap as rally in memory stocks accelerates: Micron has emerged as one of the most valuable U.S. tech companies thanks to insatiable demand for memory that's needed in AI chips. . 2026-05-05: S&P 500, Nasdaq rise to record highs as stocks get boost from oil pullback, strong earnings: Live updates: U.S. stocks were higher on Tuesday, while oil prices slid as traders reacted to a number of solid earnings results.. 2026-05-05: Oil prices above $110 are starting to matter to the stock market again: The correlation between stocks and oil, which is the most inverted it's been in 20 years, is starting to reverse. . 2026-05-05: Intel and Micron are poised to break major milestones: Options traders can't get enough of semiconductor stocks.. 2026-05-05: Jerome Powell making a 'significant mistake' by staying on at the Fed, Sen. Tim Scott says: Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell has said he plans to remain a member of the Federal Reserve board after his term as chair expires this month.. 2026-05-05: Anthropic CEO warns of cyber ‘moment of danger’ as AI exposes thousands of vulnerabilities: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei warned AI has created a narrow window for software firms, governments and banks to fix tens of thousands of vulnerabilities.. 2026-05-05: SEC advances Trump-backed proposal to end mandatory quarterly earnings reports: The SEC formally proposed a rule change that would allow companies to file semiannual reports on a new form, 10-S, in place of the traditional quarterly10-Qs. 2026-05-05: Michael Burry sells GameStop after Ryan Cohen's hefty eBay bid: 'Never confuse debt for creativity': The \Big Short\" investor said the proposed deal's enormous leverage shattered the investment case he had been building.". 2026-05-05: Iran doesn’t have ‘kamikaze dolphins,’ Hegseth says. But marine mammals have a long history of military use: Several countries, including the U.S., have a history of using dolphins in conflict areas, though not as weapons.. 2026-05-05: MasterClass CEO: I've interviewed hundreds of successful people—they taught me to stop believing a common myth about hard work: Hard work, on its own, won't automatically make you successful, says MasterClass co-founder and CEO David Rogier. Here's what else you need, he says.. 2026-05-05: Gold and oil have been two of the hottest trades of the past one year. One of them has to break: What's good for energy stocks may be bad for precious metals if the rally in crude means a rise in Treasury yields, which usually means lower gold prices.. 2026-05-05: Why Palantir's stock is down despite a stellar first quarter: There are doubts about valuation in the Anthropic Mythos era.. 2026-05-05: Microsoft Xbox CEO overhauls leadership amid sinking sales: 'We need to evolve how we work': Asha Sharma, the former Instacart and Meta executive who took over Xbox at Microsoft, said the unit doesn't spend enough time with developers and players.. 2026-05-05: Nvidia and PulteGroup are helping this startup put mini data centers on homes: A network of Span nodes, communicating with each other across the country, is the equivalent of a small to mid-sized traditional data center. . 2026-05-05: Should you buy Series I bonds amid higher inflation? What experts say: Series I bonds are paying 4.26% annual interest through Oct. 31 based on the latest inflation data. But you need to consider the trade-offs, experts say.   . 2026-05-05: Trump admin moves further into AI oversight, will test Google, Microsoft and xAI models: The White House is also considering a new AI working group that would explore potential oversight and vet models before release, CNBC confirmed.. 2026-05-05: FAA employee in New Hampshire charged with threatening to kill Trump: Federal Aviation Administration employee Dean DelleChiaie, who allegedly emailed a threat to the White House, faces up to five years in prison if convicted.. 2026-05-05: After Coinbase, prediction market traders forecast more tech layoffs ahead: Traders on prediction market platforms give a high probability to layoffs in the tech sector reaching more than 447,000 jobs in 2026.. 2026-05-05: 41% of credit card debt starts with a surprise expense — 3 ways to stay ahead: Unexpected expenses can be, well, expensive.
